nl_query: Show all approved revaluation requests where the resulting evaluation attempt was created but the evaluator has not started marking within 3 working days of the attempt assignment.
failed_sql: SELECT rr.id AS request_id, rr.script_id, rr.approved_at, ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.status, ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name AS evaluator FROM revaluation_request rr JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.id = ea.assignment_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.employee_id = sa.evaluator_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND ea.is_active = TRUE AND ea.created_at < (SELECT working_day_offset(sa.assigned_at, 3, rr.academic_year) FROM script_assignment sa WHERE sa.id = ea.assignment_id) ORDER BY rr.approved_at ASC LIMIT 200;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.exam_id, script_assignment.exam_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
